title: perezia lactucoides subsp. lactucoides
intro: Perezia lactucoides subsp. lactucoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Perezia lactucoides subsp. lactucoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation, ease pain, and support the immune system.
